name: Oxford Square Capital Corp.
summary: Oxford Square Capital Corp. (OXSQ) is a closed-end, non-diversified business development company (BDC) focused on maximizing total portfolio return. It invests primarily in corporate debt securities and collateralized loan obligation (CLO) structured finance investments, including CLO equity and junior debt tranches, warehouse facilities, and publicly traded debt and equity securities. Portfolio companies are generally below investment grade. Capital is used by borrowers for organic growth, acquisitions, recapitalizations, and working capital.

products.name: Corporate Debt Securities
products.description: Investments in below-investment-grade corporate debt, including senior secured loans to middle-market and broadly syndicated borrowers.

products.name: CLO Structured Finance Investments
products.description: Investments in equity and junior debt tranches of CLO vehicles collateralized primarily by senior secured loans.

products.name: Warehouse Facilities
products.description: Early-stage CLO financing structures intended to aggregate loans forming the basis of a traditional CLO vehicle, typically leveraged four to six times.

products.name: 5.50% Unsecured Notes due 2028
products.description: ~$80.5 million in unsecured notes issued May 2021, maturing July 31, 2028, listed on NASDAQ as OXSQG.

products.name: 7.75% Unsecured Notes due 2030
products.description: ~$74.8 million in unsecured notes issued August 2025, maturing July 31, 2030, listed on NASDAQ as OXSQH.

products.name: Corporate Debt Securities
products.description: Investments in below-investment-grade corporate loans and debt securities to finance borrower operations and growth.

products.name: CLO Structured Finance Investments
products.description: Investments in CLO equity and junior debt tranches collateralized by senior secured loans to below-investment-grade companies.

products.name: Warehouse Facilities
products.description: Financing structures that aggregate loans intended to form the basis of a CLO vehicle, typically leveraged four to six times.

products.name: 6.25% Unsecured Notes due 2026
products.description: Public offering of ~$44.8M unsecured notes at 6.25% interest; fully redeemed in 2025.

products.name: 5.50% Unsecured Notes due 2028
products.description: ~$80.5M unsecured notes at 5.50% interest, maturing July 31, 2028, listed on NASDAQ as OXSQG.

products.name: 7.75% Unsecured Notes due 2030
products.description: ~$74.8M unsecured notes at 7.75% interest, maturing July 31, 2030, listed on NASDAQ as OXSQH.

products.name: ATM Common Stock Offering
products.description: At-the-Market equity offering program allowing sale of up to $150M of common stock via Ladenburg Thalmann and Lucid Capital Markets.

partnerships.description: Sales agent for ATM equity offering under Equity Distribution Agreement, originally dated August 1, 2019.
Added as additional sales agent to Amended and Restated Equity Distribution Agreement on August 16, 2024.
Sales agent for ATM common stock offering under the Amended and Restated Equity Distribution Agreement.
Added as additional sales agent for ATM common stock offering in August 2024.
Registered investment adviser managing OXSQ's investment activities under the Investment Advisory Agreement.
